name: Meat Balls Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare basic meat balls.
2. Drain mushrooms, saving the liquid.
3. After meatballs are browned, push them to the side of the skillet.
4. Add mushrooms and brown over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
5. Add enough water to the mushroom liquid to make 1/2 cup; pour this liquid and tomato sauce over the meatballs.
6. Bring to a boil, cover the skillet, and reduce heat.
7. Sprinkle in the flour a little at a time, stirring constantly to blend.
8. Add pepper, garlic salt, evaporated milk, water, and Worcestershire sauce in that order, stirring constantly.
9. Return to low heat and cook until the sauce is thickened, about 3 to 5 minutes.
10. Add lemon juice and serve immediately with cooked rice or boiled noodles.
